ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Connecticut State Department of Education) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, third-party) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source for easy reference */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source providing the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., Chronic Absenteeism by All Students) */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_availability" TEXT /* Data availability (e.g., Town/District, Individual) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, monthly, annually) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is shared (e.g., CC BY, Public Domain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., Chronic absenteeism, Property Crime) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "measure" TEXT /* Measure used for the indicator (e.g., Number, Percentage) */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., students, incidents) */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Specific source of the indicator within the data source */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of indicator measurement (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator the dimension belongs to */,
  "dimension_name" TEXT /* Name of the dimension (e.g., Grade K-12, Age <18, Gender) */,
  "dimension_description" TEXT /* Description of the dimension */,
  "dimension_type" TEXT /* Type of dimension (e.g., demographic, geographic, temporal) */,
  "dimension_source" TEXT /* Specific source of the dimension within the data source */,
  "dimension_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dimension updates (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dimensions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., Alcohol, Marijuana) */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of variable (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  "variable_source" TEXT /* Specific source of the variable within the data source */,
  "variable_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of variable updates (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator the data entry belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data entry */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dimension associated with the data entry */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variable associated with the data entry */,
  "entry_source" TEXT /* Specific source of the data entry within the data source */,
  "entry_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data entry updates (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  "entry_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the department */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version update */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., data, metadata, report) */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file for integrity checking */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_type" TEXT /* Type of readme file (e.g., data, metadata, user guide) */,
  "readme_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the readme file for integrity checking */,
  "readme_status" TEXT /* Status of the readme file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
